# Loova Ads Studio

Create AI ads that convert, not just look good

0upvotes

Visit WebsiteView on Product HuntLaunch Package

## About Loova Ads Studio [...] ## About Loova Ads Studio

Loova Ads Studio is an innovative AI-powered platform designed to streamline the creation of high-converting advertising content. It caters to brands and marketing agencies seeking to produce engaging UGC videos, product commercials, avatar videos, and static creatives without the need for extensive video production skills. What sets Loova apart is its focus on performance-driven ads; it emphasizes not just aesthetic appeal but also effectiveness, helping users craft ads that drive conversions at a remarkably low cost—under $2 per ad. The platform's all-in-one approach simplifies the creative process, enabling rapid deployment of tailored ad assets suitable for social media, e-commerce, and digital marketing campaigns.

results.title: Create AI Product Ads from One Photo with Loova AI
results.content: they produce something that actually looks professional. The infinite canvas is genuinely useful. You see the whole story, not just one clip at a time. And the viral ad recreation feature changes the game for small brands. You're not starting from zero anymore. You're starting from what already works. It's still AI, so it's not magic. The clearer your direction, the better the result. If your prompt is vague, the output can drift. And for very specific brand details, exact logo placement, exact product accuracy at scale, you'll still want to guide it carefully. But for going from product image to a real ad direction fast, it handles that better than most workflows I've tested. If you're a creator, a marketer, or an e-commerce brand, and you need product ads without a full production [...] be the most useful thing in the whole tool. Luva just added the ability to recreate viral ads. Here's how it works. You upload two things, a reference video, any viral ad you've seen perform well, and your own product image. Then you tell the agent, "Follow the structure, pacing, and creative approach of this ad, but make it for my product." And it does exactly that. It reads the reference ad. It understands the flow, how it opens, how it builds tension, how it closes, and then it rebuilds that entire creative approach, but with your product in it. So instead of guessing what makes a good ad, you just point to one that already works, and let the agent reverse engineer it for you. And within minutes, I had my own version of that same creative structure. Okay, this is the essence my skin [...] Welcome back. If you want to unlock the power of AI without feeling overwhelmed, you're in the right place. We explore smart tools that solve real problems, spark creativity, and help you get more done in less time, all explained in a simple and stress-free way. I gave one idea to an AI and it didn't just make me a video, it planned the whole thing, the character, the world, the story, the scenes, like it was thinking with me. And then it turned all of it into a finished product ad. No timeline, no 20 tabs, no blank screen, just one idea directed into a real commercial. Let me show you exactly how that works. Because normally making a product ad is a mess. You write the concept somewhere, you jump to one AI tool to make the images, then another to animate them, then another for the voice,

## Why Choose Loova AI UGC Ad Maker?

### Turn Any Product or URL into a UGC Ad

Transform product images or product pages into engaging AI UGC videos automatically. Loova extracts product information, visuals, and selling points to create conversion-focused ads in minutes.

### Realistic AI UGC Creators [...] ### Realistic AI UGC Creators

Choose from a growing library of natural-looking AI actors with realistic facial expressions, lip sync, and voiceovers that feel authentic on every social platform.

### Create Your Own AI UGC Creator

Build a custom AI avatar based on your brand, spokesperson, or creator. Reuse the same AI actor across campaigns to maintain a consistent brand identity.

### Ready-to-Convert Ads for Under $2

Create professional AI UGC ads at a fraction of traditional production costs. Launch campaigns faster while keeping creative expenses low.

### Generate More Winning Creatives Faster

Produce dozens of ad variations from a single product. Test different hooks, scripts, avatars, voiceovers, and styles to quickly identify your highest-performing campaigns.

# Viral Ad Clone

Transform proven viral ads into high-converting videos and images with your own products and characters.

UGC Style

Product Commercial

UGC Style

Product Commercial

## What Is Viral Ad Clone Maker?

Viral Ad Clone Generator is an AI tool that turns a proven ad structure into a new ad for your brand. Upload a viral ad, and AI analyzes elements like the hook, pacing, scenes, and CTA. Loova decodes successful advertising formulas, reimagines them for your brand, and crafts authentic, high-converting ad creatives tailored to your business.

Highlight

## Why Choose Loova Viral Ad Clone?

### Clone Competitor Ads Stay On-Brand [...] ### Create More Variations From One Reference

One good ad reference can become many new creative directions. Loova helps you generate different versions from the same viral structure, so you can test hooks, products, angles, formats, and messages without rebuilding every ad from scratch.

### Maintain Consistent Brand Identity

A cloned ad should still feel like it belongs to your brand. Loova lets you replace the original content with your own product images, presenters, visual direction, and messaging, so the final result feels fresh, relevant, and aligned with your brand identity.

### Access Full Ad Creation Tools in Loova Ads Studio [...] ### Clone Competitor Ads Stay On-Brand

Loova analyzes the creative pattern behind a viral ad then it regenerates that with your own product visuals, avatar, script, and brand message, so the final ad feels fresh in execution. From the opening hook to the final CTA, each part is rebuilt around your product, brand voice, and marketing goal.

### Generate Complete Ready-to-Use Ads

With Loova, you don't just get a rough idea or a script draft. You can turn a reference ad into a complete video creative ready for faster review and testing, without starting from scratch. Viral Ad Clone helps you move from idea to execution quickly.

### Create More Variations From One Reference
